sections.paragraph:
Original: זנות

Transliteration: zônôth

Phonetic: zo-noth'

BDB Definition:

  1. fornications
    1. armour (used in warfare not sanctioned by Jehovah) (figuratively)

Origin: regarded by some as if from H2109 or an unused root, and applied to military equipments

TWOT entry: but evidently the act. participle of 02181

Part(s) of speech: Neuter
